item.title: α-Halo carboxylic acids and esters
item.description: α-Halo carboxylic acids and esters are organic compounds with the respective formulas RCHXCO2H and RCHXCO2R' where R and R' are organic substituents. The X in these compounds is a halide, usually chloride and bromide. These compounds are often used as intermediates in the preparation of more elaborate derivatives. They are often potent alkylating agents. The mono halide derivatives are chiral.

item.title: 2024 Elon Phoenix football team
item.description: The 2024 Elon Phoenix football team represented Elon University as a member of the Coastal Athletic Association Football Conference (CAA) during the 2024 NCAA Division I FCS football season. The Phoenix were led by sixth-year head coach Tony Trisciani and played their home games at Rhodes Stadium in Elon, North Carolina.

item.title: Horse the Band
item.description: Horse the Band (stylized as HORSE the band) is an American metalcore band[1] from Lake Forest, California, who are best known for their 8-bit video game-influenced sound combined with metalcore. Frontman Nathan Winneke once jokingly described their sound as "Nintendocore", although the band have gone to lengths to distance themselves from the label, reiterating that this merely describes the sound, not the substance.

item.title: Pleuranthodium pedicellatum
item.description: Pleuranthodium pedicellatum is a monocotyledonous plant species first described by Theodoric Valeton, and given its current name by Rosemary Margaret Smith.[1] Pleuranthodium pedicellatum is part of the genus Pleuranthodium and the family Zingiberaceae.[2][3]

item.title: Washington D.C. Area Film Critics Association Awards 2005
item.description: The 4th Washington D.C. Area Film Critics Association Awards, honoring the best in filmmaking in 2005, were given on December 12, 2005.[1][2][3]
